phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get castle maps
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os mapas do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH MAH-puhsh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Tourist office staff expect direct questions for free maps.

likely_response.local: No balcão de informações, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the information desk, on the right.

responses.english: At the information desk, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: No balcão de informações, à direita.
